Package org.rodinp.core.tests.relations

Class AbstractItemRelationParserTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.relations.AbstractItemRelationParserTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
ItemRelationParserTests, LegacyRelationParserTests
public class AbstractItemRelationParserTests extends Object
Abstract class to define unit tests for classes ItemRelationParser, ElementParser and their subclasses.
